title: 81-year-old Minecraft streamer GrammaCrackers swatted during cancer fundraiser stream
summary_full: An 81-year-old Twitch streamer, known as GrammaCrackers, was swatted during a marathon Minecraft livestream aimed at raising funds for her grandson's cancer treatment. Despite the frightening arrival of numerous police officers, she maintained a positive attitude, even finding the experience "kinda fun." The incident drew widespread anger online, with many supporting her efforts and hoping for increased donations.
